texto: Differences in reading ability between five-year olds and eight-year olds are caused primarily by the older children's possessing more knowledge, not by the differences in their memory capacities, reasoning abilities, or control of eye movements.
explicacao: Citação de E.D. Hirsch Jr. sobre temas ligados a educacao. “Differences in reading ability between five-year olds and eight-year olds are caused primarily by…” articula educacao, education, reflexao em registro de educacao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
